message:
fix(host): prevent metric window drift and handle zero-length windows

Two fixes to MetricWindow::roll_if_needed:

- Zero window: treat configured_window==0 as a config change to force
  a reset, preventing divide-by-zero in elapsed / window_seconds
- Window drift: align new window start to a multiple of window_seconds
  instead of resetting to `now`, which caused accumulated drift when
  roll checks happened after multiple windows had elapsed

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
